tasks.start: deno task prepare:deno && DENO_DIR=.deno-cache deno run -A npm:expo@~54.0.0 start
tasks.android: deno task prepare:deno && DENO_DIR=.deno-cache deno run -A npm:expo@~54.0.0 start --android
tasks.ios: deno task prepare:deno && DENO_DIR=.deno-cache deno run -A npm:expo@~54.0.0 start --ios
tasks.web: deno task prepare:deno && DENO_DIR=.deno-cache deno run -A npm:expo@~54.0.0 start --web
tasks.check: deno task check:app && deno task check:edge && deno task check:tests
tasks.check:app: deno check --unstable-sloppy-imports App.tsx index.ts src shared
tasks.check:tests: DENO_NO_PACKAGE_JSON=1 deno check --no-config tests/rules.test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/game.ts supabase/functions/_shared/database.types.ts supabase/functions/_shared/game.test.ts
tasks.validate: deno task check && deno task test
